mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_members (document_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{userId}, #{role}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM document_members WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM document_members WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM document_members WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY joined_at ASC
